title: DockerAdapter (compat-only-not-default) preserving KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter integration
goal: Implement the DockerAdapter as the third concrete SandboxAdapter per spec §3.5.2, preserving the existing KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter integration as one of three adapters. Tagged compat-only-not-default; selected only when operator explicitly opts in via SandboxAdapterRegistry.set_docker_explicit_opt_in(true) (no implicit fallback per spec §3.5.3).
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/sandbox/docker/{mod.rs, adapter.rs, kernel_003_bridge.rs}; integration tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/docker_adapter_tests.rs (gated by `#[cfg_attr(not(feature="docker-integration"), ignore)]`). The kernel_003_bridge.rs module is the thin glue mapping the shipped KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter container-management code onto the SandboxAdapter trait surface; existing KERNEL-003 code is NOT rewritten here (that's MT-054).
unblock_conditions: Shared types + SandboxAdapter trait merged. KERNEL-003 code in main provides the existing DocketAdapter; this MT bridges, MT-054 refactors the callers.
implementation_notes: Per spec §3.5.2 the DockerAdapter is tagged compat-only-not-default; per refinement R-3 ('Sandbox-architecture-flip-orphans-KERNEL-003') the 3-adapter pattern explicitly preserves the KERNEL-003 work. Implementation: shell out to the `docker` CLI (matches the KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter approach — no bollard or docker-api crate). adapter.rs implements SandboxAdapter by translating ProcessSpec into `docker run` argv: (1) `spawn`: `docker run --rm -d --name <uuid_v7> -v host:guest:mode -e ... <image> <cmd>` with NetPolicy mapped (DenyAll -> `--network=none`; LoopbackOnly -> `--network=bridge` plus iptables localhost rule; Allowlist -> ephemeral docker network plus iptables); resource_limits via `--memory --cpus --pids-limit`; capture container id as sandbox_internal_id; mint ProcessHandle UUID v7. (2) `exec`: `docker exec` with stdin/stdout pipes; ExecResult populated with duration_ms. (3) `fs_bind`: post-spawn binds unsupported by Docker (same as Podman); SpawnFailed loud per spec §3.5.3. (4) `net_policy`: `docker network connect/disconnect`; DenyAll = disconnect all networks. (5) `kill`: Term -> `docker stop -t 10`; Kill -> `docker kill --signal KILL`; Int -> `docker kill --signal INT`. (6) `status`: `docker inspect --format '{{.State.Status}}'`. (7) `exit_code`: `docker inspect --format '{{.State.ExitCode}}'`. (8) `capabilities()`: AdapterCapabilities { adapter_id: "docker", filesystem_isolation_strength: Strong, network_isolation_strength: Strong, gpu_passthrough: NvidiaCuda (when host has nvidia-container-toolkit; detect via `docker run --rm --gpus all nvidia/cuda:base nvidia-smi` once, cache 60s), stdio_throughput_class: High, win32_native_fidelity: false, cross_machine_portable: true }. kernel_003_bridge.rs: thin re-export/wrap of the existing KERNEL-003 helper types (image-pull retry policy, container-tagging convention, docker-CLI argv builder) so behavior parity with KERNEL-003 is structural, not coincidental; if KERNEL-003 already exposes `docker_cli_argv_builder(spec) -> Vec<String>`, reuse it; if not, copy the relevant function and ADD a `// Adapted from KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter (commit a813b76)` source-of-truth comment. Integration tests (gated): `docker run --rm alpine:3.20 echo hello` returns 0; NetPolicy::DenyAll prevents outbound DNS; bind ReadOnly enforced. CRITICAL: this adapter must register itself in the registry as compat-only — `capabilities().adapter_id == "docker"` AND `set_docker_explicit_opt_in(true)` is required before selection (MT-043) returns it. A test asserts that with default opt-out, selection.select() returns SandboxSelectionFailure not DockerAdapter.
risk_if_missed: Without DockerAdapter, R-3 ('orphans KERNEL-003') triggers — every existing Docker-using KERNEL-003 sandbox consumer breaks in MT-054 refactoring with no migration target.
validator_focus: (a) Adapter delegates docker CLI calls the same way KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter does (verified by comparing argv shapes); (b) capabilities() returns adapter_id=="docker" and the rest of the AdapterCapabilities matches the KERNEL-003 baseline; (c) compat-only-not-default is enforced — opt-out test in selection.rs MUST refuse Docker selection; (d) UUID v7 in ProcessHandle.id.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Compat-only enforcement test: registry.select() with default opt-out and a ProcessSpec preferring docker returns SandboxSelectionFailure, never the DockerAdapter.
Behavior parity with KERNEL-003: golden argv-shape test compares docker_cli_argv_builder output to a fixture captured from KERNEL-003 to prove behavior parity.
Image-pull retry policy is preserved from KERNEL-003 (same exponential backoff, same max attempts).

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: DockerAdapter is well-built and the compat-only-not-default rule is enforced by selection.rs+set_docker_explicit_opt_in, but the kernel_003_bridge cannot deliver the contract's behavior-parity promise (KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter does not exist; only ContainerAdapterStub remains) and the same LoopbackOnly silent-downgrade bug as the Podman adapter is present.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: DockerAdapter is well-built and the compat-only-not-default rule is enforced by selection.rs+set_docker_explicit_opt_in, but the kernel_003_bridge cannot deliver the contract's behavior-parity promise (KERNEL-003 DocketAdapter does not exist; only ContainerAdapterStub remains) and the same LoopbackOnly silent-downgrade bug as the Podman adapter is present.
